title: Rocketpool - Open App
meta_description: rocketpool official route for ETH to rETH liquid staking: open the app, verify the domain, and review wallet prompts before you proceed.
hero_h2: Swap ETH into liquid staking exposure
hero_lead: rocketpool routes ETH holders to the official Rocket Pool app for staking into rETH while keeping the experience wallet-first, domain-aware, and focused on Ethereum mainnet.
what_is: Rocket Pool is a decentralized Ethereum liquid staking protocol for staking ETH and receiving rETH, with official guides published in the Rocket Pool documentation.

how.d: Use the official staking interface and confirm the browser domain is stake.rocketpool.net before connecting a wallet.
Choose an Ethereum wallet you control and make sure it is on Ethereum mainnet.
Review the rETH output, gas estimate, and wallet transaction details before submitting.
After confirmation, check the rETH token in your wallet or on a trusted Ethereum explorer.

points.p: The core flow is ETH to rETH, so it fits users who want staking exposure without running a validator.
The rETH ERC-20 contract can be checked on Etherscan before adding or interacting with the asset.
Liquid staking uses Ethereum staking mechanics and carries protocol, smart contract, market, and wallet execution risks.

faq.a: rocketpool is commonly used to stake ETH through Rocket Pool and receive rETH, a liquid staking token for Ethereum DeFi use cases.
rocketpool is not a generic DEX; the app's main ETH-to-rETH flow is a staking action that can feel swap-like because users exchange ETH exposure for rETH exposure.

faq.q: What is the official rocketpool app URL?
faq.a: The official app route is https://stake.rocketpool.net/; verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
Rocket Pool is built around Ethereum staking, and the main rETH token is an ERC-20 on Ethereum mainnet.
No. Rewards, exchange rates, liquidity, and risks can change, so review the official docs and wallet transaction details before acting.

footer_note: Not the official Rocket Pool app; verify stake.rocketpool.net before connecting a wallet; educational only, not financial advice.
